title: cobblemon Lucky Block
description: Added lucky blocks to Cobblemon and made them compatible with many add-ons
body:
This mod adds Lucky Blocks to Cobblemon and ensures compatibility with most popular add-ons, including [Cobblemon] Navas' ZAmega and Cobblemon: Mega Showdown. Players can choose whether to install these add-ons, though omitting them may result in missing in-game features.

Lucky Block Types Added

• Pokémon Lucky Block (integrated with base Cobblemon)

• Mega Stone Lucky Block (designed for Cobblemon: Mega Showdown)

• Sun Shard Lucky Block

• Z-Crystal Lucky Block

• ZA Mega Stone Lucky Block (built for [Cobblemon] Navas' ZAmega)

High Customizability

All Lucky Blocks in this mod are created using vanilla commands, making them highly flexible. You can modify each of the five Lucky Block types directly in the mod's config file—simply input an item ID or Pokémon nickname to adjust their behavior.

Important Notes

• The Pokémon Lucky Block generates Pokémon from IDs 1-1025 by default. If new Pokémon are added to your Cobblemon setup, you may need to manually update this range in the config.

• This mod does not include crafting recipes for its items. You can add recipes using other mods, data packs, or manual methods such as quest rewards.

• Use the command /poketips [true/false] to toggle the Lucky Block destruction prompt on or off.
